name: Fireside Cheddar-Olive Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure all ingredients except olives and place them in the mixing bowl in the order suggested by the manufacturer.
2. Add the olives at the time of the raisin/nut beep or 5 to 10 minutes before the last kneading cycle ends.
3. Select regular bake or rapid bake cycle. Do not use delayed bake cycle.
